channel.title: Awesome Mac - 최근 추가된 앱
channel.description: 한국어 목록 기준으로 최근 추가된 macOS 앱입니다.

item.title: Mocker
item.description: Category: 개발 도구 / 가상화 App: Mocker Description: Apple Containerization framework 기반 컨테이너 관리 도구. Open Source: https://github.com/us/mocker Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 개발 도구 / 가상화
App: Mocker
Description: Apple Containerization framework 기반 컨테이너 관리 도구.
Open Source: https://github.com/us/mocker
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: DB Pro
item.description: Category: 개발 도구 / 데이터베이스 App: DB Pro Description: SQL 데이터베이스를 조회하고 관리하는 클라이언트. Website: https://dbpro.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 개발 도구 / 데이터베이스
App: DB Pro
Description: SQL 데이터베이스를 조회하고 관리하는 클라이언트.
Website: https://dbpro.app
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: TrailBase
item.description: Category: 개발 도구 / 데이터베이스 App: TrailBase Description: 타입 안전한 API, 인증, 관리 도구를 제공하는 SQLite 기반 오픈 소스 백엔드 플랫폼. Website: https://trailbase.io Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 개발 도구 / 데이터베이스
App: TrailBase
Description: 타입 안전한 API, 인증, 관리 도구를 제공하는 SQLite 기반 오픈 소스 백엔드 플랫폼.
Website: https://trailbase.io
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: electerm
item.description: Category: 개발 도구 / 터미널 앱 App: electerm Description: 터미널, SSH, SFTP 클라이언트. Website: https://electerm.github.io/electerm/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Website: https://electerm.github.io/electerm/

Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Droply
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 디자인 도구 App: Droply Description: 이미지 배경을 오프라인으로 일괄 제거하는 도구. Website: https://convergencelab.gumroad.com/l/droply Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Website: https://convergencelab.gumroad.com/l/droply
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Lunacy
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 디자인 도구 App: Lunacy Description: 내장 에셋과 실시간 협업을 지원하는 벡터 디자인 도구. Website: https://icons8.com/lunacy Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Simple Diagrams
item.category: 디자인 및 제품 / 프로토타이핑 및 마인드맵 도구
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 프로토타이핑 및 마인드맵 도구 App: Simple Diagrams Description: 손그림 스타일의 러프 스케치를 빠르게 만드는 다이어그램 도구. Website: https://www.simplediagrams.com/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:

App: Simple Diagrams
Description: 손그림 스타일의 러프 스케치를 빠르게 만드는 다이어그램 도구.
Website: https://www.simplediagrams.com/

Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: macshot
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 스크린샷 도구 App: macshot Description: 화면 녹화, 스크롤 캡처, OCR을 지원하는 스크린샷 주석 도구. Open Source: https://github.com/sw33tlie/macshot Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Open Source: https://github.com/sw33tlie/macshot
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Capty

item.title: Screen Studio
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 화면 녹화 App: Screen Studio Description: 자동 모션 효과로 보기 좋은 영상을 만드는 화면 녹화 도구입니다. item.title: Tight Studio
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 화면 녹화 App: Tight Studio Description: 스마트 줌, 자막, AI 보이스오버를 지원하는 화면 녹화 도구입니다. item.title: BlurScreen App
item.description: Category: 디자인 및 제품 / 기타 도구 App: BlurScreen App Description: 녹화나 화면 공유 중 민감한 화면 내용을 즉시 흐리게 처리하는 도구. Website: https://www.blurscreen.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: GroAsk
item.description: Category: AI 도구 App: GroAsk Description: 선택한 텍스트를 AI 어시스턴트와 CLI 에이전트로 보내는 메뉴 막대 런처. Website: https://groask.com Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Website: https://groask.com
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.description: Category: AI 도구 App: RecurseChat Description: 사용자화 가능한 로컬 우선 AI 채팅 앱. Website: https://recurse.chat Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: remio

item.title: Stack
item.description: Category: 커뮤니케이션 / 협업 및 팀 도구 App: Stack Description: 여러 웹 앱을 한 화면에서 정리해 쓰는 워크스페이스 브라우저. Website: https://getstack.app/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: 1440 Minutes Left Today
item.description: Category: 유틸리티 / 생산성 App: 1440 Minutes Left Today Description: 메뉴 막대에서 오늘 남은 시간을 분 단위로 보여주는 도구. Website: https://1440app.com/ Commit: Update productivity app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0eb344f71263a769681732fd8294539503f723ee

item.title: BetterTouchTool

item.title: FnKeyboard
item.description: Category: 유틸리티 / 생산성 App: FnKeyboard Description: 메뉴 막대에서 기능 키를 빠르게 호출하는 도구. Open Source: https://github.com/kotique123/FnKeyboard Commit: Update productivity app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0eb344f71263a769681732fd8294539503f723ee
item.content:encoded:
Category: 유틸리티 / 생산성
App: FnKeyboard
Description: 메뉴 막대에서 기능 키를 빠르게 호출하는 도구.
Open Source: https://github.com/kotique123/FnKeyboard
Commit: Update productivity app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0eb344f71263a769681732fd8294539503f723ee

item.title: Revu
item.category: 읽기 및 쓰기 도구 / 노트 작성
item.description: Category: 읽기 및 쓰기 도구 / 노트 작성 App: Revu Description: FSRS 스케줄링과 Anki 가져오기를 지원하는 로컬 우선 간격 반복 학습 앱. Website: https://revu.cards/ Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4
item.content:encoded:
Category: 읽기 및 쓰기 도구 / 노트 작성
App: Revu
Description: FSRS 스케줄링과 Anki 가져오기를 지원하는 로컬 우선 간격 반복 학습 앱.
Website: https://revu.cards/
Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4
